infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Guard requires your location to verify you are on-site during shifts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Guard monitors your location in the background to ensure geofence compliance during your shift.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Guard uses the camera for clock-in verification and shift reports.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to quickly and securely sign in.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Guard monitors your location during shifts for geofence compliance.

plugins.cameraPermission: Guard uses the camera for clock-in verification and reports.
